Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, jurisdiction_17, sector_01, customer_10], list every asset value X such that classified_as(customer=customer_16, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_21, asset=?X) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"asset","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b02_classified_as","args":{"asset":{"var":"X"},"customer":{"const":"customer_16"},"jurisdiction":{"const":"jurisdiction_21"}}}}
